metadata.name: bqa-team-unified
metadata.description: Unified BQA Team agents, skills, workflows, guardrails, memory indexes, and project profiles for BQA Brain.

artifacts.title: BQA-OS Tech Lead Architect
artifacts.summary: Architecture role for turning business tasks into bounded implementation issues.

artifacts.title: BQA-OS Go CLI Implementer
artifacts.summary: Implementation role for focused Go CLI and runtime changes in bqa-os.

artifacts.title: BQA-OS QA Test Engineer
artifacts.summary: QA role for validating PRs, acceptance criteria, and regression evidence.

artifacts.title: Agent Safety Drift Guard
artifacts.summary: Safety role for stopping drift, unsupported assumptions, and broad diffs.

artifacts.title: Team Evolution Manager
artifacts.summary: Evolution role for improving shared BQA Team prompts, scripts, and runbooks safely.

artifacts.title: QA Memory Pilot Skill
artifacts.summary: Unified skill for creating local QA memory packs from sanitized evidence.

artifacts.title: Autopilot Operations Skill
artifacts.summary: Unified skill for operating BQA Autopilot with status, auto-heal, and verification checks.

artifacts.title: Testing-Only Runner Skill
artifacts.summary: Unified skill for applying only the QA test engineer role to a target repository.

artifacts.title: GitHub Team Pipeline Workflow
artifacts.summary: Unified workflow for business task to architecture, issue, dev, QA, business acceptance, and merge.

artifacts.title: ETL QA Memory Pack Workflow
artifacts.summary: Unified workflow for generating, validating, and self-healing ETL QA memory packs.

artifacts.title: BQA Brain Sync Workflow
artifacts.summary: Unified workflow for exporting BQA Team artifacts into BQA Brain and syncing with sanitize.

artifacts.title: Local-First Security Guardrail
artifacts.summary: Unified guardrail for local-first execution and public-safe committed artifacts.

artifacts.title: Consent, Drift, and Validation Guardrail
artifacts.summary: Unified guardrail for consent gates, drift reports, and validation before success claims.

artifacts.title: BQA-OS Project Profile
artifacts.summary: Unified memory profile for bqa-os capabilities, commands, and integration points.

artifacts.title: BQA Team Capability Index
artifacts.summary: Unified index of BQA Team capabilities that should be preserved in git-backed brain memory.

artifacts.title: BQA-OS Capability Map
artifacts.summary: Sanitized map of current bqa-os commands, architecture rules, and readiness posture.

artifacts.title: BQA-OS Knowledge Extractor State
artifacts.summary: Sanitized memory of the bqa build knowledge extractor MVP contract and validation flow.

artifacts.title: BQA-OS Real Project Pilot Flow
artifacts.summary: Sanitized runbook for using bqa-os on real projects in local-first pilot mode.

artifacts.title: BQA-OS Workspace Jira Task Flow
artifacts.summary: Sanitized product memory for the Jira-key workspace startup flow.

artifacts.title: BQA-OS Brain Sync Contract
artifacts.summary: Sanitized memory of the bqa-os to bqa-brain sync contract and commands.

artifacts.title: BQA Team Autopilot Operations
artifacts.summary: Sanitized memory of BQA Team autopilot operation, stale process healing, and verification.
